name: @context-battler/throwaway-d-full-match
description: Throwaway Godot 4 WASM full-match replay prototype.

scripts.capture:weapon-equipped: if [ -z "$GODOT_BIN" ]; then echo "Weapon equipped capture requires GODOT_BIN" >&2; exit 1; fi && xvfb-run -a "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --script res://scripts/capture-equipped-weapons.gd
scripts.import:glitch-reaper: if [ -z "$GODOT_BIN" ]; then echo "Glitch Reaper import requires GODOT_BIN" >&2; exit 1; fi && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/import-glitch-reaper-prototype.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-glitch-reaper-prototype.gd
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-scaffold.mjs && if [ -z "$GODOT_BIN" ]; then echo "Round-12 Godot audits require GODOT_BIN; unset is a validation failure" >&2; exit 1; fi && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-character-scales.gd -- --assert --target-world-height 1.71 --character-model-scale 1.0 && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-mesh2motion-clips.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/verify-character-rigs.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-hell-cyborg-skin.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-universal-body.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-adherence-matrix.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-replay-load.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-skin-bone-attachments.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-modular-submesh-armor.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-armour-prop-aabb.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/import-glitch-reaper-prototype.gd && "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-glitch-reaper-prototype.gd
